OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The token of the user who represents the connector in the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object (for information only).

CONNECTOR_TYPE.description: Should always be set to INTERNAL_ENRICHMENT for this connector.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: Default confidence level (0-100) attached to STIX objects created by the connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Determines the verbosity of the logs.

ASSEMBLYLINE_URL.description: Base URL of the AssemblyLine 4 deployment (e.g. https://assemblyline.example.com).

ASSEMBLYLINE_APIKEY.description: AssemblyLine API key associated with the configured user.

ASSEMBLYLINE_VERIFY_SSL.description: Set to false to disable TLS verification (self-signed AssemblyLine deployments).

ASSEMBLYLINE_CLASSIFICATION.description: AssemblyLine classification marker attached to every submission.

ASSEMBLYLINE_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum number of seconds to wait for a submission to complete before giving up.

ASSEMBLYLINE_FORCE_RESUBMIT.description: When true, every enrichment re-submits the file even if AssemblyLine already has results for it.

ASSEMBLYLINE_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB.description: Files larger than this size (in MB) are skipped (the AssemblyLine API would reject them anyway).

ASSEMBLYLINE_INCLUDE_SUSPICIOUS.description: When true, suspicious-rated IOCs are imported alongside malicious-rated ones.

ASSEMBLYLINE_CREATE_ATTACK_PATTERNS.description: When true, MITRE ATT&CK techniques observed by AssemblyLine become Attack-Pattern SDOs in OpenCTI.

ASSEMBLYLINE_CREATE_MALWARE_ANALYSIS.description: When true, the connector emits a Malware-Analysis SDO that surfaces in the Malware Analysis section of the observable.

ASSEMBLYLINE_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: When true, an Observable is created next to each generated Indicator and linked through a based-on relationship.

ASSEMBLYLINE_SEQUENTIAL_MODE.description: When true, the connector waits for AssemblyLine to be idle (no in-flight submission) before sending a new one. The wait is capped by ASSEMBLYLINE_TIMEOUT.

ASSEMBLYLINE_POLL_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between idle-checks when ASSEMBLYLINE_SEQUENTIAL_MODE is enabled.

ASSEMBLYLINE_MAX_TLP.description: Observables marked above this TLP are skipped. The connector will not submit their file content to the external AssemblyLine deployment.
